raw_consumer_statement:
I submitted a claim to Barclays Bank about an unauthorized charge of {$600.00}. On XX/XX/ XXXX I received a letter stating that the matter was with a dispute specialist, and it could take up to 45 days to resolve. 
On XX/XX/XXXX I called to check on the progress of my claim and learned they closed the case citing that I did not answer a phone call from them. I was told to resubmit a letter requesting that the claim be reopened. 
On XXXX XXXX I mailed a letter requesting they reopen my claim. 
On XX/XX/XXXX I spoke to the dispute department, who transferred me to the fraud department who then transferred me back to the dispute department where XXXX assured me that a manager would call me within 48 as they do not have managers on site. I never received a call. 
On XX/XX/XXXX I spoke to XXXX in the fraud department who sent my call to XXXX in disputes. XXXX said the manager would call me within 24 hours. Again, I did not receive a call. 
On XX/XX/XXXX I spoke to XXXX who said a manager would call me within 48 hours. 
As of today XX/XX/, I have still not received a phone call from a manager at Barclays Bank nor has the charge been removed from my account. 
I find their handling of my claim unprofessional and dishonest ; I would like this charge removed and reimbursement for the interest that I have been charged.
